creator: Emma Button

evidence.text: The blameless post-mortem. When people hear that I talk about blameless failure, most people go, "Uh, blameless post-mortem, I know about that." Well, I don't really talk about blameless postmortem because the only place where you're looking to eliminate blame is after an incident happened, then you've got it all wrong. Blameless culture starts right from the very beginning that you need to be trying to eliminate that finger pointing right from the beginning of your development cycle. That's it.
